description: Tutorial dialogue strings for the onboarding system

welcome: Welcome to Sitka Cove! Walk to the dock and talk to Gustav.
Ahoy, newcomer! Head to the dock - the old fisherman waits.
You've arrived at Sitka Cove. Find Gustav at the dock to begin.
Fresh face on the dock! Go meet Gustav - he's the grumpy one.
Welcome, traveler. The dock awaits, and so does Gustav.
The sea calls to you! Find Gustav at the dock to start your journey.
meet_gustav: Nice! Gustav can be grumpy but he knows his fish. Try /cast to fish.
You found him! Gustav will show you the ropes. Use /cast to start fishing.
Good, you met Gustav. He's... an acquired taste. Try casting your line!
Gustav the grumpy! He gave you a rod? Try /cast in the water.
The old fisherman accepts you! Now try catching something. /cast
Gustav's not so bad once you know him. Cast your line and fish!
first_cast: Your line is in the water! Wait for a bite...
Casting... Now watch the bobber. When it dips, you've got one!
Line cast! Patience, angler. The fish will come.
Perfect cast! Now wait for the bobber to dip underwater.
The hook is set. Watch carefully - fish are sneaky!
Line out! Stay focused on that bobber.
first_catch: Your first catch! Take it to Gustav - he'll buy it.
A fish! Show Gustav at the dock. He pays fair prices.
Nice catch for a beginner! Gustav trades fish for credits.
You caught one! Gustav at the dock will buy it from you.
First fish landed! Take it to Gustav to earn your first credits.
The sea provides! Sell your catch to Gustav to continue.
sell_fish: Great! You're earning credits now. The tutorial is almost done.
First sale complete! You're ready to fish on your own.
Credits earned! Talk to Gustav for tips, or explore the village.
Your first earnings! You're nearly a full angler now.
Gustav paid up! You're learning the trade. Almost done!
Transaction complete! You've mastered the basics.
tutorial_complete: Tutorial complete! You're now a Sitka Cove angler. Good luck out there!
Well done, angler! You've learned the basics. The sea awaits!
You've got the hang of it! Fish, trade, and explore. Welcome to Sitka Cove!
Congratulations! You're officially an angler. Go catch them all!
Tutorial finished! The cove is yours to explore. Tight lines!
You've graduated! Gustav might even smile at you now. Maybe.

welcome: Back again? Let's get you settled. Talk to Gustav at the dock.
Returning player? Find Gustav to continue your journey.
Welcome back! The dock and Gustav await.
meet_gustav: Still need to meet Gustav? He's at the dock.
Go find Gustav at the dock to continue.
Gustav the fisherman awaits at the dock.
first_cast: Ready to fish? Use /cast or right-click with your rod!
Time to cast! Use your fishing rod in the water.
The fish are waiting. Cast your line!
first_catch: Still looking for that first catch? Keep trying!
Your first fish is out there. Keep casting!
Don't give up! Every angler started with zero catches.
sell_fish: Take your catch to Gustav to complete the tutorial.
Sell your fish to Gustav to finish your training.
Almost done! Gustav will buy that fish.
tutorial_complete: You're a full angler now. Go fish!

welcome: Psst... the dock is that way. Look for the guy in the raincoat.
Not sure where to go? Follow the path to the water.
The dock is east of here. Gustav waits.
Yellow raincoat. Grumpy expression. You can't miss him.
meet_gustav: Gustav won't bite. Talk to him with !talk Gustav
The old fisherman has rods to spare. Ask him!
Try saying hello to Gustav. Use !talk Gustav
Gustav's at the dock. He's... mostly friendly.
first_cast: Try /cast to throw your line, or right-click with a fishing rod.
The fish are waiting! Cast your line into the water.
Equip your rod and cast! /cast or right-click.
Water + rod + patience = fish. Start with /cast
first_catch: Keep trying! Fish bite more at certain times.
Patience is key. Watch the bobber closely.
The fish will come. Trust the process.
Every cast is a chance. Don't give up!
sell_fish: Gustav buys fish! Talk to him to sell your catch.
Need credits? Gustav at the dock pays for fish.
Sell your catch to Gustav to earn credits.
Fish in inventory? Sell to Gustav at the dock!

first_catch_common: A fish. It is a start.
first_catch_uncommon: A step up from the usual trash.
Not bad. Not bad at all.
first_catch_rare: A rare one? For your first? Impressive.
first_catch_legendary: A LEGENDARY? For your first catch? I... what?
This is unprecedented. I have no words.
Okay. You have my attention now.

celebration_announcements: A new angler is born! {{player}}'s first catch: {{fish}}
The sea has accepted {{player}}. First fish: {{fish}}
Welcome to the trade, {{player}}! First catch: {{fish}}
{{player}} has joined the ranks of anglers! First catch: {{fish}}
